message:
test(fcp-core): pin IntentStatus state machine + IdempotencyEntry predicates + OperationValidationError 9-variant Display (flywheel_connectors-l53eq)

Bead asks for IntentLifecycle state-transition pinning per documented
state machine. No type literally named IntentLifecycle exists in
fcp-core. The intent lifecycle is IntentStatus (operation.rs:356)
5-variant ladder driven through IdempotencyEntry (operation.rs:389)
predicates and validated by OperationValidationError (operation.rs:445).

intent_manifest_serde_tag_matrix.rs pins IntentStatus serde matrix.
exactly_once_golden_vectors.rs checks displayability + status serde
roundtrip. This pin adds residual axes.

Coverage: documented state-machine transition truth table per the 5
documented transitions (Pending→InProgress, Pending→Orphaned,
InProgress→Completed, InProgress→Failed, InProgress→Orphaned). 5x5
matrix walked against allow-list, terminal-states-have-no-outgoing
sentinel (Completed/Failed/Orphaned can't transition), Pending
restriction sentinel (cannot skip directly to Completed/Failed),
InProgress no-reverse sentinel. IdempotencyEntry predicate truth tables:
is_terminal exhaustive over 5 statuses (only Completed+Failed),
is_expired boundary (now < / == / > expires_at), should_return_cached
3-variable truth table (status × receipt_id × expired). is_intent_orphaned
4-corner truth table including STRICT > threshold rule and
clock-skew (now < planned_at) boundary. required_idempotency_for_safety_tier
4-cell truth table. OperationValidationError 9-variant Display
verbatim with payload preservation, IdempotencyKeyMismatch <none>
rendering for None Option, distinct-Display sentinel,
std::error::Error impl.

23 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-l53eq cargo test -p
fcp-core --test intent_lifecycle_state_machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
